4014010.en: Savage God, Mad King, Incarnation of Strife
4014010.desc: The Titan of Strife continues the mad war in their frenzy, becoming the unconquerable fear of the masses of Amphoreus.\nThey once were famed through glory, earning respect from gods and from the people of the land. Only their evil reputation lingers in this lightless era and end times, tainting the Throne of Worlds' brilliance.

4014020.desc:
The undefeated. The sovereign of all battles. The king of Castrum Kremnos and of ruins,
Grand Artisan of the war chariot, the throne upon a mountain of corpses, and father of victory,
The tyrant of glories, the lightning that split the sea, the Guardian of Amphoreus,

4014030.en: Pollux, Netherwing Husk, Ferry of Souls
4014030.desc: Netherwing, slumbering dormant in the River of Souls, has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

4015010.en: Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky
4015010.desc: The Sky Titan. Theos Synthetos. Conquered by and fused with humanity, they no longer govern Amphoreus' cycle of day and night, yet their aloof pride remains unchanged.\nIn their mind, the shattered world's mundane mortals are unsightly — compared to a world safeguarded by light, the mindless human masses seem more befitting of the black tide.

4052010.desc:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Loyal and fair waves, bathing in the mud that overflows from your master's cup... your pristine skirts stained with madness—
You drift directionless between surges of life and death, finding no solace, no moment's peace.

4052011.desc: Those driven mad by the sea siren's song lose their sanity the moment they leap into the ocean, becoming the sirens' pawns.

4052020.desc:
Daughters of the sea, their spirits and flesh corroded by the sins of Destruction, leaving only empty, distorted shells... In this life, they follow the Ocean's honed blade, not to be obliterated into nihility, but to become the tidal waves crashing against the Dark Sun.
The apocalyptic storm descends from the heavens, heralding the extinction of all things.
O premature Mirage Fizzle, doomed to perish before birth, exhaling countless sorrows.
The murky amniotic fluid flows, staining heaven and earth black, tainting even newborn hope.

4053010.desc:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Enchanting waves, you drank calamity for your sovereign, and your visage is adorned with wine-stained petals and shattered pearls—
You lie drunken in the frenzied abattoir, and in this grave of blood and honeyed ruin, you sing your elegy into the void.

5012100.desc:
Planarcadia's security force and idol group, the Magical Girl Troupe.
In the ancient Benzaitengoku era, witches used exorcism dances and songs to vanquish the darkness lurking in the world.
Times have changed, and these witches have evolved into a profession in modern-day Planarcadia that combines spirit exorcism, riot control, counter-terrorism, and entertainment: the "magical girls."
Contrary to their cute appearance, magical girls frequently face the most sinister threats in Planarcadia, which is why most of them have... less-than-pleasant personalities in private.

5013040.desc:
The pinnacle of logic and composure... or is he? He maintains a constant air of unshakeable calm, as if he's a walking encyclopedia of wisdom and lore, but at his core, he's just a sardonic loser with a talent for snark.
"My job is simply to decide what to do. As for whether it's actually possible... well, that's for you all to worry about... Holy Aha, you guys are actually doing it!?"
Cleaving the heavens! Wings spread like lightning! Warrior of the cyan welkin — Azurewing Warrior!
Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!

After witnessing the crash of the Astral Express, a vision of ascending to the heavens took root within her, leading her to turn against her own creator alongside the Nameless.\nUltimately, to protect this realm, she sought to encanvas all of existence. Within her lonely sorrow, she depicted the vengeful spirits fallen at the hands of Asat Pramad over and over again, until that very resentment finally drove her to madness.
5014032.ja: 創始の絵師、無量塔グラフィエ

5022010.desc: Tendrils of flesh spreading from Shuhu's infinite growth, an evil flower nurtured by twisted delusions.

5022020.desc: A human infected by the Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus.\nApart from endless surges of joy, they remain unmoved by the six emotions and untainted by the six desires.

5023010.desc: A human infected by the Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus.\nApart from endless surges of joy, they remain unmoved by the six emotions and untainted by the six desires.

5023011.desc: A human infected by the Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus.\nApart from endless surges of joy, they remain unmoved by the six emotions and untainted by the six desires.

5023012.desc: A human infected by the Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus.\nApart from endless surges of joy, they remain unmoved by the six emotions and untainted by the six desires.

5023020.desc: A monstrous legion created from Asat Pramad's split "Voracity" power, now the prototype of the "imagenae." Asat Pramad sensed within the dormant core from Ahatopia an unending hunger tied to the Voracity, whose pulsation resonated closely with the Path of Destruction. Amused by this restless force, he began his dark creation: erasing human heads, leaving only grinning, devouring mouths that howl, demand, and consume without end.

5023021.desc: A monstrous legion born from Asat Pramad's splitting of the power of the Voracity — the prototype of what would become the imagenae. From Ahatopia's slumbering core, he sensed the Voracity's relentless, insatiable hunger, its power pulsing in perfect harmony with the Path of Destruction. Intrigued by this restless force, he began his own dark creation — erasing human heads, leaving only grinning, devouring maws that roar, demand, and consume endlessly, never satisfied.

5024010.desc:
The director of Fulwish TV, fused with the flesh of Shuhu that was brought into Planarcadia.
During the last Phantasmoon Games fifteen years ago, a serial killer known as the "Herald of Death" caused countless casualties. His actions left numerous residents without parents, siblings, and classmates.
Physical scars can heal, but scars of the mind and soul can never be mended again. The people formed a "Victims' Mutual Aid Society" in an attempt to heal this wound.
Fulwish perfected a "Happiness Surgery." Once administered, everyone would eternally forget their suffering and remain happy. The source of this surgery was pieces of Shuhu's flesh.
Fifteen years later, the "Victims' Mutual Aid Society" evolved into the renowned "Research Society of Happy Smiles." This simple little surgery, disguised as a cosmetic procedure or medical treatment, infected countless people in Planarcadia and allowed Shuhu's cells to slumber within the populace.
As the president of the Research Society of Happy Smiles, Fulwish harbored hatred toward the Phantasmoon Games that spawned the Herald of Death, and thus transformed into "Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus," launching her revenge against this world.
5024010.ja: {RUBY_B#ごくらくてんとう}極楽顛倒{RUBY_E#}・{RUBY_B#じゃがんれんしゅ}邪願蓮主{RUBY_E#}

8003011.desc: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an alien life form that was born out of the Fragmentum brought by a Stellaron and feeds on this world's energy. Its armor reflects the gloomy and profound starry sky.\nIn combat, the Ice Out of Space (Bug) will freeze targets it touches and delay their actions.

It has developed a more agile fighting style ever since its original form became distorted.\nThe Stormbringer utilizes the power of the wind to its advantage in battle, enabling it to fire arrows more rapidly. It can also summon Windspawn to aid in combat.

8011010.desc: In order to prevent antiparticles from dissipating and annihilating normal matter, the Antimatter Legion created two types of miniature ion traps for transportation, collectively referred to as Baryons and Antibaryons.\nBaryons have basic intelligence, and can clear the path according to the commands and summons of Voidrangers on the battlefield.

8011020.desc: In order to prevent antiparticles from dissipating and annihilating normal matter, the Antimatter Legion created two types of miniature ion traps for transportation, collectively referred to as Baryons and Antibaryons.\nAntibaryons have basic intelligence, and can clear the path according to the commands and summons of Voidrangers on the battlefield.

8012010.desc: Warriors yet to perish were recast in the Warforge and gained Destruction's power. Antimatter completes their bodies and negative particles reverberate throughout their forms.\nViolently aggressive, they embody the will of Destruction and are basic combat units of the Antimatter Legion, acting only according to their destructive instincts.
8012010.ja: ヴォイドレンジャー・{RUBY_B#りゃくだつ}略奪{RUBY_E#}

8012020.desc: A Voidranger that has successfully survived particle annihilation, the positive and negative particles in its body have temporarily achieved a strange balance, granting them more power than ordinary reavers.\nBasic combat units of the Antimatter Legion. They possess some intelligence and are able to control reavers within a small surrounding area.
8012020.ja: ヴォイドレンジャー・{RUBY_B#かい}改{RUBY_E#}ざん

8012030.desc: Bodies that continued to be corroded by the Fragmentum after death. While their vital signs have changed, they continue to carry out their orders to eliminate.\nVoidranger: Eliminators will mark enemies they hit, causing them to take extra damage when attacked.
8012030.ja: ヴォイドレンジャー・{RUBY_B#まっしょう}抹消{RUBY_E#}

8015010.desc: Using fragments of the Dusk Leviathan as the foundation, and the weeping bones of thousands of the dead in the Warforge as the agent, the Antimatter Legion cast the Doomsday Beast. The resentful spirits' senseless obsession turns into a tangible hand, and the shadow of the old disaster conceals the heavens. The Doomsday Beast detains the will of all beings that are not at ease and have yet to die. Anger, mourning, or delusional joy — all is revealed, and all evil eagerly throb. The Doomsday Beast's core is a dark matter engine.

8015030.desc: The three faces of Paranirmitavaśavartin, and the true appearance of the Lord Ravager that wields authority over all possibilities.\nAll things in myriad forms pass through "Formation," "Existence," and "Decay," until they turn to "Annihilation." Elation and time are mortal enemies. Beneath the endless erosion of the ages, all things shall fade into silence.\nTo execute the Sky's decree of the Destruction, fulfilling the ambition of extinguishing all minds who bear emotions in the world.
8015030.ja: {RUBY_B#ばんしょくきくうしゅ}万色帰空主{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#きじゃく}帰寂{RUBY_E#}

8015040.desc:
A Navigator named "Isee" embarked on a trailblazing expedition to save the Elation.
He helped planets overcome crises, resolving troubles across the cosmos, all to find a cure for the Elation.
Yet, the longer his journey went on, the more familiar worlds he witnessed descending into corruption and ruin. One world even attempted to repay the Express Crew's rescue with mutual destruction.
Ultimately, after the fall of the God of Trailblaze and having witnessed the end of Adlivun with his own eyes, he finally realized that the only cure for the Elation was... the Destruction.

8015050.desc:
The Lord Ravager known as Asat Pramad is devising a game to destroy the Elation.
He invades defenseless planets, forges from golden blood a lineage born only to destroy, all to mock life itself, and with it, mock the Elation.
Yet, this is far from enough to satisfy him. To realize his grand ambition of eliminating the Elation, he resolves to awaken the Aeon to carry out the most thorough destruction, even if the cost might be himself.
Ultimately, as the Express arrives once more, the time is ripe. He enters the game under a stolen identity, striving to craft the most magnificent and absolute finale to this game.

8024010.desc: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a mature True Sting. 8025010.desc: The replica of the Emanator of Propagation cultivated by Ruan Mei, briefly manifesting in the world in an incomplete form. Its original form is a giant lepisma that inherited the mandibles of the Imperator Insectorum. It can collect in its mouthparts the death ray that fragmented celestial bodies, and make shattered stars incubators for procreating offspring. It was once one of the nightmares across multiple worlds during the Swarm Disaster.
